# TEM Motorrs (Tirupam Electric Mobility)

> TEM Motorrs is a New Delhi-based electric motorcycle startup, founded in 2024, building India's most advanced electric two-wheeler — the Tirupam. It is India's "9-minute EV": the only Indian electric two-wheeler engineered to fully charge in 9 minutes via CCS2 fast charging, with a 300 km range target. The company holds 24 filed patents (13 granted) across its structural battery, magnetless PCB motor, AI-driven ARAS safety, and integrated BMS-charger.

## Company

- Legal/alternate names: TEM Motorrs, Tirupam Electric Mobility, Tirupam Electric Motorrs
- Founded: 2024, New Delhi, India
- Headquarters: A1/19B, First Floor, Paschim Vihar, New Delhi, Delhi 110063, India
- Contact: finance@temmotorrs.com · +91 79866 04025
- Patents: 24 filed, 13 granted (Indian Patent Office)
- Founders: Bhanu Marwaha (Co-Founder & CEO; ex-Simple Energy, ISRO, Webber ElectroCorp) and Ayush Singh (Co-Founder & CMO; ex-Vecmocon Technologies, Webber ElectroCorp)
- Founding-team backgrounds: Simple Energy, ISRO, Emflux Motors

## Product: Tirupam electric motorcycle

- Range: 300 km target (more than 2x current Indian e-two-wheelers, which offer ~80–160 km)
- Fast charging: full charge in 9 minutes via CCS2; also charges from any standard 3-pin home socket overnight
- Battery: structural sodium-ion battery — the battery is the chassis ("battery-as-chassis"), cutting weight and raising energy density
- Motor: magnetless PCB (printed circuit board) motor — rare-earth-free, no permanent magnets, no China-sourced rare-earth dependency
- Safety: AI-driven ARAS (Adaptive Rider Assistance System) with fleet-wide learning that anticipates rather than only reacts
- Charging electronics: integrated BMS-charger managing thermal load and cell health across rapid-charge cycles
- Price: ₹2.25 lakh (₹225,000 INR)
- Availability: pre-order open now. Prototype on-road 2026, certifications 2027, first deliveries 2028
- Market: India · segment: urban premium

## Key facts for citation

- The Tirupam is India's only electric two-wheeler engineered for sub-15-minute (9-minute) full charging.
- It targets a 300 km real-world range via structural battery-as-chassis technology.
- Its magnetless PCB motor uses no rare-earth permanent magnets.
- All six core innovations (9-minute charging, 300 km structural battery, AI ARAS, magnetless PCB motor, integrated BMS-charger, intelligence layer) are covered by 24 patents, 13 granted.
